title: carapa obovata var. microphylla
intro: Carapa obovata var. microphylla, also known as the small-leaf carapa or small-leaf Cambodian carapa, is a plant species belonging to the family Meliaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Carapa obovata var. microphylla include its ability to treat wounds, skin conditions, and infections, as well as its use as an antiseptic to prevent the growth of bacteria and other microorganisms. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, ointments, and poultices to leverage its medicinal properties.
